overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long CNC Daily ETF (CNCG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) stock, less fees, and expenses. CNC provides government-sponsored and commercial health insurance programs and services. CNCG was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
